comments.author: github-actions
comments.body:
**Dignified Code Simplification**: Intermediate variable `metadata_block` is created and used much later (line 294). This violates the 'Declare Variables Close to Use' principle. Consider simplifying:

```python
# Current
metadata_block = plan_header_block_raw
if metadata_block.endswith(PLAN_CONTENT_SEPARATOR):
    metadata_block = metadata_block[: -len(PLAN_CONTENT_SEPARATOR)]
# ... lines later ...
pr_body = summary_body + original_plan_section + "\n\n" + metadata_block

# Simplified
stripped = plan_header_block_raw
if stripped.endswith(PLAN_CONTENT_SEPARATOR):
    stripped = stripped[: -len(PLAN_CONTENT_SEPARATOR)]
pr_body = summary_body + original_plan_section + "\n\n" + stripped
``` 

This moves the declaration and use closer together. - [Dignified Python: Declare Variables Close to Use](docs/learned/conventions.md#declare-variables-close-to-use)

comments.author: schrockn
comments.body:
Fixed in 3beeb93: moved `metadata_block` declaration closer to use and replaced manual endswith/slice with `removesuffix()`.

_Addressed via `/erk:pr-address` at 2026-02-25 05:54 PST_

comments.author: github-actions
comments.body:
**Dignified Code Simplification**: Intermediate variable `stripped` is created and used on the next line within the same conditional block. Consider using the ternary operator to compute the value inline:

```python
# Current
if plan_header_block:
    stripped = plan_header_block
    if stripped.endswith(PLAN_CONTENT_SEPARATOR):
        stripped = stripped[: -len(PLAN_CONTENT_SEPARATOR)]
    suffix = "\n\n" + stripped

# Simplified  
if plan_header_block:
    header_block = (
        plan_header_block[: -len(PLAN_CONTENT_SEPARATOR)]
        if plan_header_block.endswith(PLAN_CONTENT_SEPARATOR)
        else plan_header_block
    )
    suffix = "\n\n" + header_block
```

This eliminates the intermediate variable by computing the value where it's needed. - [Dignified Python: Declare Variables Close to Use](docs/learned/conventions.md#declare-variables-close-to-use)

comments.author: schrockn
comments.body:
Fixed in 3beeb93: eliminated `stripped` variable by inlining `removesuffix()` directly into the suffix assignment.
